messages.text:
Besides that, we also have another collaboration model. We have a fully managed program where you post 100 videos a month with a guaranteed $100. All the videos are already generated for you in the backend, so you only need to click post. The quality of these videos is much better than what we have now, with no color or shape inconsistencies. They use our most expensive AI model, and some even go through manual checking and light editing, so they’re ready to use. You’d just post them directly.

Under this model, if GMV is below $3k, there’s no commission. If it’s between $3k and $10k, you get 50% of the commission. If it’s between $10k and $20k, you get 30% of the commission.

The advantage of this model is that you only need to tap post and don’t need to spend extra time. Both options can work.
